title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bharat Heavy Electricals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Bharat Heavy Electricals:
Bharat Heavy Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bharat Heavy Electricals!
